% check a.php
a.php:13:3: $n is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:14:3: $another is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:22:3: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)
a.php:24:10: class method `Foo::do` does not exist
a.php:29:3: $val is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:32:3: $y is of type: Foo (DEBUG)
a.php:33:3: $this is of type: Foo (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:9:3: $a is of type: \stdClass (DEBUG)
b.php:17:1: $i is of type: int (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:16:1: $i is of type: Employees\Worker (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:10:3: $x is of type: Utils\Container (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

/**
 * @property int $number
 */
class Foo
{
	private string $name;

	protected function process(string $another): string
	{
		$n = $this->name;
		#debugType $n
		#debugType $another
	}

	public void $number;

	private function check()
	{
		$x = $this->number;
		#debugType $x

		$this->do(function() use ($x) {
			echo $x;
		});

		$val = $this->process($x);
		#debugType $val

		$y = $this;
		#debugType $y
		#debugType $this
	}
}
-- b.php --
<?php

namespace Path\To\Module;

class Bar
{
	private function watch(\stdClass $a, ?array $x, $y = 'default', $z = [])
	{
		#debugType $a
	}

	private function switch($msg = Foo\Bar::BAZ_CONST, $opt = array('R' => 128)): ?int;
}

$b = new Bar;
$i = $b->switch();
#debugType $i
-- c.php --
<?php

namespace Employees;

class Person
{
	public function identity(): static;
}

class Worker extends Person
{
}

$w = new Worker;
$i = $w->identity();
#debugType $i
-- d.php --
<?php

namespace Utils;

class Container
{
	static function create(): self
	{
		$x = new self;
		#debugType $x
		return $x;
	}
}
